title: avenula pratensis var. vasconica
intro: Avenula pratensis var. vasconica, also known as a specific variety of meadow oat-grass, is a plant species in the grass family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Avenula pratensis var. vasconica are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, it is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health conditions.
